records.m_Talk_ENG: In a fleeting moment.
records.m_Talk_DEU: In a fleeting moment.
records.m_Talk_FRA: In a fleeting moment.

records.m_Talk_ENG: They say, in the moment before death, time seems to slow for humans.
records.m_Talk_DEU: They say, in the moment before death, time seems to slow for humans.
records.m_Talk_FRA: They say, in the moment before death, time seems to slow for humans.

records.m_Talk_ENG: P-pleased to meet you all!
records.m_Talk_DEU: P-pleased to meet you all!
records.m_Talk_FRA: P-pleased to meet you all!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I may not be much, but I'll do my best to support you all!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I may not be much, but I'll do my best to support you all!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I may not be much, but I'll do my best to support you all!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? So what if you're not from one of the Twelve Houses?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? So what if you're not from one of the Twelve Houses?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? So what if you're not from one of the Twelve Houses?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Captain's the strongest and most reliable among us. That's all that matters!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Captain's the strongest and most reliable among us. That's all that matters!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Captain's the strongest and most reliable among us. That's all that matters!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm still not strong like the others...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm still not strong like the others...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm still not strong like the others...

records.m_Talk_ENG: But one day, I'll become a real knight just like you, Captain!
records.m_Talk_DEU: But one day, I'll become a real knight just like you, Captain!
records.m_Talk_FRA: But one day, I'll become a real knight just like you, Captain!

records.m_Talk_ENG: The moment draws near. The gap between the C.O.s and the retreating footsteps of comrades closes.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The moment draws near. The gap between the C.O.s and the retreating footsteps of comrades closes.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The moment draws near. The gap between the C.O.s and the retreating footsteps of comrades closes.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Claws slash through the air, but the world still flows past in slow motion.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Claws slash through the air, but the world still flows past in slow motion.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Claws slash through the air, but the world still flows past in slow motion.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Captain's clashing with the C.O.!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Captain's clashing with the C.O.!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Captain's clashing with the C.O.!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Damn it, we're too far to provide backup...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Damn it, we're too far to provide backup...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Damn it, we're too far to provide backup...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: There's no fear.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There's no fear.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There's no fear.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And so, I press forward.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And so, I press forward.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And so, I press forward.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Dame Esterosa. Please reconsider appointing me as deputy.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Dame Esterosa. Please reconsider appointing me as deputy.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Dame Esterosa. Please reconsider appointing me as deputy.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even among my family, I was never the gifted one. If I take the role, I'll only be a burden to the Order.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even among my family, I was never the gifted one. If I take the role, I'll only be a burden to the Order.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even among my family, I was never the gifted one. If I take the role, I'll only be a burden to the Order.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yet in the last mission, I remember you stuck right behind me to save the civilians.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yet in the last mission, I remember you stuck right behind me to save the civilians.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yet in the last mission, I remember you stuck right behind me to save the civilians.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Fione, the deputy's role is to support the captain, no matter what.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Fione, the deputy's role is to support the captain, no matter what.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Fione, the deputy's role is to support the captain, no matter what.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And I believe that if I ever hit a wall someday...
records.m_Talk_DEU: And I believe that if I ever hit a wall someday...
records.m_Talk_FRA: And I believe that if I ever hit a wall someday...

records.m_Talk_ENG: You'll be the one standing beside me, cutting a path forward.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You'll be the one standing beside me, cutting a path forward.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You'll be the one standing beside me, cutting a path forward.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Strike true...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Strike true...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Strike true...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: This time for sure...!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: This time for sure...!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: This time for sure...!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: D-Deputy's Scorpio Lance just changed form?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: D-Deputy's Scorpio Lance just changed form?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: D-Deputy's Scorpio Lance just changed form?!

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Let them have it, Deputy
8g
8g
8g!!

Let them have it, Deputy
8g
8g
8g!!
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Let them have it, Deputy
8g
8g
8g!!

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Go, Captain

8g

Go, Captain
